SELECT DISTINCT  ?indianCompanyWithMostEmployees ?companiesOverMillionEmployees ?ibmRevenue
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?indianCompanyWithMostEmployees
      WHERE
        { ?indianCompanyWithMostEmployees
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q4830453> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q668> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1128>  ?employees
        }
      ORDER BY DESC(?employees)
      LIMIT   1
    }
    OPTIONAL
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

        WHERE
          { ?type (<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q4830453> .
            ?companiesOverMillionEmployees
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  ?type ;
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1128>  ?num
            FILTER ( ?num > 1000000 )
          }
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q37156>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2139>  ?ibmRevenue
      }
  }
LIMIT   1
